---
id: update-global-cluster-variable
title: "Update a global-scoped cluster variable"
sidebar_label: "Update a global-scoped cluster variable"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "put api-method"
info_path: docs/apis-tools/orchestration-cluster-api-rest/specifications/orchestration-cluster-api
custom_edit_url: null
hide_send_button: true
---

import MarkerRequiredPermissions from "@site/src/mdx/MarkerRequiredPermissions";

import MarkerAddedInVersion from "@site/src/mdx/MarkerAddedInVersion";

import MarkerStronglyConsistentExtension from "@site/src/mdx/MarkerStronglyConsistentExtension";

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"}>
  {"Update a global-scoped cluster variable"}{" "}
  <MarkerAddedInVersion version="8.9" />
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/cluster-variables/global/{name}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
></MethodEndpoint>

<MarkerStronglyConsistentExtension />

Updates the value of an existing global cluster variable.
The variable must exist, otherwise a 404 error is returned.

<MarkerRequiredPermissions
  permissions={[{ resourceType: "CLUSTER_VARIABLE", permissionType: "UPDATE" }]}
/>

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[
    {
      name: "name",
      in: "path",
      required: true,
      schema: {
        example: "feature-flag-checkout",
        description:
          "The name of a cluster variable. Unique within its scope (global or tenant-specific).",
        format: "ClusterVariableName",
        type: "string",
        title: "ClusterVariableName",
      },
      description: "The name of the cluster variable",
    },
  ]}
></ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{
    required: true,
    content: {
      "application/json": {
        schema: {
          type: "object",
          required: ["value"],
          properties: {
            value: {
              type: "object",
              description:
                "The new value of the cluster variable. Can be any JSON object or primitive value. Will be serialized as a JSON string in responses.",
            },
          },
          title: "UpdateClusterVariableRequest",
        },
      },
    },
  }}
></RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{
    "200": {
      description: "Cluster variable updated successfully",
      content: {
        "application/json": {
          schema: {
            type: "object",
            required: ["value"],
            allOf: [
              {
                description: "Cluster variable response item.",
                type: "object",
                required: ["name", "scope", "tenantId"],
                properties: {
                  name: {
                    description:
                      "The name of the cluster variable. Unique within its scope (global or tenant-specific).",
                    allOf: [
                      {
                        example: "feature-flag-checkout",
                        description:
                          "The name of a cluster variable. Unique within its scope (global or tenant-specific).",
                        format: "ClusterVariableName",
                        type: "string",
                        title: "ClusterVariableName",
                      },
                    ],
                  },
                  scope: {
                    type: "string",
                    enum: ["GLOBAL", "TENANT"],
                    description: "The scope of a cluster variable.",
                    title: "ClusterVariableScopeEnum",
                  },
                  tenantId: {
                    type: "string",
                    nullable: true,
                    description:
                      "Only provided if the cluster variable scope is TENANT. Null for global scope variables.",
                  },
                },
                title: "ClusterVariableResultBase",
              },
            ],
            properties: {
              value: {
                description: "Full value of this cluster variable.",
                type: "string",
              },
            },
            title: "ClusterVariableResult",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "400": {
      description: "The provided data is not valid.",
      content: {
        "application/problem+json": {
          schema: {
            description:
              "A Problem detail object as described in [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457). There may be additional properties specific to the problem type.\n",
            type: "object",
            required: ["type", "title", "status", "detail", "instance"],
            properties: {
              type: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri",
                description: "A URI identifying the problem type.",
                default: "about:blank",
                example:
                  "https://docs.camunda.io/api/v2.0/problem-types/bad-request",
              },
              title: {
                type: "string",
                description: "A summary of the problem type.",
                example: "Bad Request",
              },
              status: {
                type: "integer",
                format: "int32",
                description: "The HTTP status code for this problem.",
                example: 400,
                minimum: 400,
                maximum: 600,
              },
              detail: {
                type: "string",
                description: "An explanation of the problem in more detail.",
                example:
                  "Request property [maxJobsToActivates] cannot be parsed",
              },
              instance: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri-reference",
                description:
                  "A URI path identifying the origin of the problem.",
                example: "/v2/jobs/activation",
              },
            },
            title: "ProblemDetail",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "401": {
      description: "The request lacks valid authentication credentials.",
      headers: { "WWW-Authenticate": { schema: { type: "string" } } },
      content: {
        "application/problem+json": {
          schema: {
            description:
              "A Problem detail object as described in [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457). There may be additional properties specific to the problem type.\n",
            type: "object",
            required: ["type", "title", "status", "detail", "instance"],
            properties: {
              type: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri",
                description: "A URI identifying the problem type.",
                default: "about:blank",
                example:
                  "https://docs.camunda.io/api/v2.0/problem-types/bad-request",
              },
              title: {
                type: "string",
                description: "A summary of the problem type.",
                example: "Bad Request",
              },
              status: {
                type: "integer",
                format: "int32",
                description: "The HTTP status code for this problem.",
                example: 400,
                minimum: 400,
                maximum: 600,
              },
              detail: {
                type: "string",
                description: "An explanation of the problem in more detail.",
                example:
                  "Request property [maxJobsToActivates] cannot be parsed",
              },
              instance: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri-reference",
                description:
                  "A URI path identifying the origin of the problem.",
                example: "/v2/jobs/activation",
              },
            },
            title: "ProblemDetail",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "403": {
      description: "Forbidden. The request is not allowed.",
      content: {
        "application/problem+json": {
          schema: {
            description:
              "A Problem detail object as described in [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457). There may be additional properties specific to the problem type.\n",
            type: "object",
            required: ["type", "title", "status", "detail", "instance"],
            properties: {
              type: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri",
                description: "A URI identifying the problem type.",
                default: "about:blank",
                example:
                  "https://docs.camunda.io/api/v2.0/problem-types/bad-request",
              },
              title: {
                type: "string",
                description: "A summary of the problem type.",
                example: "Bad Request",
              },
              status: {
                type: "integer",
                format: "int32",
                description: "The HTTP status code for this problem.",
                example: 400,
                minimum: 400,
                maximum: 600,
              },
              detail: {
                type: "string",
                description: "An explanation of the problem in more detail.",
                example:
                  "Request property [maxJobsToActivates] cannot be parsed",
              },
              instance: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri-reference",
                description:
                  "A URI path identifying the origin of the problem.",
                example: "/v2/jobs/activation",
              },
            },
            title: "ProblemDetail",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "404": {
      description: "Cluster variable not found",
      content: {
        "application/problem+json": {
          schema: {
            description:
              "A Problem detail object as described in [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457). There may be additional properties specific to the problem type.\n",
            type: "object",
            required: ["type", "title", "status", "detail", "instance"],
            properties: {
              type: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri",
                description: "A URI identifying the problem type.",
                default: "about:blank",
                example:
                  "https://docs.camunda.io/api/v2.0/problem-types/bad-request",
              },
              title: {
                type: "string",
                description: "A summary of the problem type.",
                example: "Bad Request",
              },
              status: {
                type: "integer",
                format: "int32",
                description: "The HTTP status code for this problem.",
                example: 400,
                minimum: 400,
                maximum: 600,
              },
              detail: {
                type: "string",
                description: "An explanation of the problem in more detail.",
                example:
                  "Request property [maxJobsToActivates] cannot be parsed",
              },
              instance: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri-reference",
                description:
                  "A URI path identifying the origin of the problem.",
                example: "/v2/jobs/activation",
              },
            },
            title: "ProblemDetail",
          },
        },
      },
    },
    "500": {
      description: "An internal error occurred while processing the request.",
      content: {
        "application/problem+json": {
          schema: {
            description:
              "A Problem detail object as described in [RFC 9457](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc9457). There may be additional properties specific to the problem type.\n",
            type: "object",
            required: ["type", "title", "status", "detail", "instance"],
            properties: {
              type: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri",
                description: "A URI identifying the problem type.",
                default: "about:blank",
                example:
                  "https://docs.camunda.io/api/v2.0/problem-types/bad-request",
              },
              title: {
                type: "string",
                description: "A summary of the problem type.",
                example: "Bad Request",
              },
              status: {
                type: "integer",
                format: "int32",
                description: "The HTTP status code for this problem.",
                example: 400,
                minimum: 400,
                maximum: 600,
              },
              detail: {
                type: "string",
                description: "An explanation of the problem in more detail.",
                example:
                  "Request property [maxJobsToActivates] cannot be parsed",
              },
              instance: {
                type: "string",
                format: "uri-reference",
                description:
                  "A URI path identifying the origin of the problem.",
                example: "/v2/jobs/activation",
              },
            },
            title: "ProblemDetail",
          },
        },
      },
    },
  }}
></StatusCodes>
